com.cellsimulation.model.Person

Package
Description
com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.

  • Uses of Person in com.cellsimulation.model

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model that return Person
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Person
    Grid.getCell(Position position)
    Returns the person occupying the given position, or null if the cell is empty.
    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type Person
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Grid.setCell(Position position, Person person)
    Places (or removes) a person at the given position.
